# External References

Use this folder for source material that should stay separate from the curated
handbook.

Good candidates:

- broad source dumps that do not clearly belong to one topic;
- personal screenshots or inbox-style reading material;
- duplicate legacy source folders kept only for comparison.

Avoid committing copied course exports, large PDFs, or whole repositories unless
the license permits it and the material is useful enough to keep.

When a source becomes part of your own learning, summarize or rewrite the useful
parts in the relevant handbook folder and link back to the original source here.

For topic-owned forks or copied repositories, prefer a local `external/` folder
inside the topic. For example, React references live under
`../frontend/react/external/`.
